title: Cleaning Supervisor
description:
Key Responsibilities:

  • Supervise and coordinate a team of cleaners to complete all scheduled cleaning tasks efficiently and effectively.
  • Inspect cleaning work to guarantee quality standards are met.
  • Identif any issues or areas for improvement and implement corrective measures.
  • Ensure cleaning supplies and equipment are well-stocked and properly maintained.
  • Liaise with clients to understand their needs and address any concerns promptly.
  • Provide training and guidance to cleaning staff to develop their skills and ensure consistent performance.
  • Maintain detailed records and documentation related to cleaning activities.
  • Assist the management team with administrative duties as required.
  • Assign duties and monitor daily workload of cleaners.
  • Ensure compliance with health and safety regulations.
  • Report maintenance or repair needs to management.
  • Prepare and submit reports on staff performance and cleaning status.

What we're looking for

  1. At least 2 years previous experience as a Cleaning Supervisor or or in a similar role.
  2. Strong leadership and organizational skills.
  3. Excellent attention to detail and commitment to maintaining high cleaning standards
  4. Ability to multitask, prioritise and work efficiently under pressure
  5. Ability to work independently and manage a team effectively.
  6. Familiarity with cleaning chemicals, supplies, and equipment.

Preferred Qualifications:

  • Experience in commercial, residential, or industrial cleaning environments.
  • Basic computer skills for scheduling and reporting purposes.

postedCompany.description:
BESTWAY CLEANING SERVICES PTE LTD offers accumulated experience and expertise in provision of cleaning services to the private sector comprising commercial, residential and industrial projects, since our formation.

We are registered with the Building and Construction Authority (BCA) under the financial grade of L6 for Housekeeping, Cleaning & Conservancy. We take pride in delivering quality products and services to our clients. Your satisfaction is our top most priority.

BESTWAY also prides itself in being able to meet standards set by industry professionals. All of our workers are train by our in-house training centre and have gone through training and are certified by approved training institutes under the Singapore Workforce Development Agency (SWDA) Workforce Skills Qualifications (WSQ) frameworks. We believe in continuous learning and invest heavily in our human capital by sending them for training and skills upgrading courses, striving to achieve a more engaging workforce.

Moreover, we have achieved ISO9001:2008 certification in 2013. This shows our commitment in providing excellent service and maintaining our competitive edge by innovating our work processes.

BESTWAY also believes in looking out for the welfare of our workers. Being an avid advocate for workplace safety and health policies, BESTWAY attained OHSAS18001:2007 and Bizsafe Star certifications on 2013.

By obtaining ISO 14001 certification in 2013, BESTWAY play its parts toward the environmental. Use the reduce, reuse and recycle approach to make tangible cost reductions as well the potential to reduce taxes and liability insurances
postedCompany.name: BESTWAY CLEANING SERVICES PTE LTD
